codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/upload'
params = {
    'clientId': 'qsl-integration-test',
    'path': 'rest-api-tests',
    'source': 'data',
    'filename': 'test-file.txt',
    'mimeType': 'text/plain'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    },
    json={
      "fileData": "data:text/plain;base64,SGVsbG8gZnJvbSBSRVNUIEFQSSB0ZXN0IQ==",
      "mimeType": "text/plain",
      "overwrite": True
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/file-system'
params = {
    'clientId': 'qsl-integration-test',
    'source': 'data',
    'recursive': 'false'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3011'
path = '/download'
params = {
    'clientId': 'qsl-integration-test',
    'path': 'rest-api-tests/test-file.txt',
    'source': 'data',
    'format': 'base64'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'c2f25bfd78a7fe3e7b3294dbf5f026285989fa0d7f7b73b2108305e68f64b796'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
